name: BB:FalsePositive: Windows AD Source Authentication Events
notes: This Building Block defines the addresses of Windows Authentication or Active Directory Servers.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Windows AD Source Authentication Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the source IP is one of the following 127.0.0.0/8
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication

when the event QID is one of the following (5000543) Failure Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled global group, (5000899) Success Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled global group, (5000570) Failure Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled universal group, (5000926) Success Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled universal group, (5000547) Failure Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled local group, (5000903) Success Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled local group, (5000910) Success Audit: A user account was locked out, (5000094) User Account Locked Out
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Windows AD Source Authentication Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the source IP is one of the following 127.0.0.0/8
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication

AND NOT when the event QID is one of the following (5000543) Failure Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled global group, (5000899) Success Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled global group, (5000570) Failure Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled universal group, (5000926) Success Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled universal group, (5000547) Failure Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled local group, (5000903) Success Audit: A member was added to a security-enabled local group, (5000910) Success Audit: A user account was locked out, (5000094) User Account Locked Out
